rule.name: Fastapi Debug Mode Enabled
rule.vuln_desc: Debug mode can expose internals and increase exploitability in production.
rule.developer: Disable debug mode in production and enforce environment-specific config.
rule.reviewer: Verify deployment profiles do not enable debug/reload. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Fastapi Unsafe Deserialization
rule.rule_desc: Detects unsafe deserialization primitives in framework request/worker flows.
rule.vuln_desc: Unsafe deserialization of untrusted data can lead to code execution.
rule.developer: Use safe loaders (e.g., yaml. safe_load) and trusted serialization boundaries.
rule.reviewer: Trace untrusted input reaching deserialization functions. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Fastapi SQL Injection Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely string-built SQL execution in framework data access paths.
rule.vuln_desc: String-formatted SQL may be vulnerable to SQL injection.
rule.developer: Use query parameter binding and ORM-safe APIs.
rule.reviewer: Review query construction and verify parameterization. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Fastapi Permissive CORS
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard CORS allows untrusted browser origins to access APIs.
rule.reviewer: Validate CORS settings in all environment profiles. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Fastapi Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded secrets may leak and be abused if repository/artifacts are exposed.
rule.developer: Externalize secrets and rotate exposed values.
rule.reviewer: Confirm no live credentials are embedded in source. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
